fields.title: Add sandbox-backed benchmark and checks runner for Autoresearch
fields.description: Implement the real execution path for run_experiment benchmark commands and optional autoresearch.checks.sh execution under tau sandbox policy, with streaming partial output support.
fields.design: Provide an adapter-side boundary implementation that uses tau sandbox-owned command execution rather than direct spawn in Autoresearch code. Support streaming benchmark output to tool onUpdate, one-shot checks execution, timeout handling, and structured exit, timing, and output results. If sandbox or subagent policy disallows required execution, return a clear error instead of falling back to unsandboxed behavior.
